title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXV. Natural History.
content:
Snail, snail, shut out your horns;
            Father and mother are dead:
        Brother and sister are in the back yard,
            Begging for barley bread.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DLXV. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
